Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted
Off Calendar Jun-12-2023 Continued To Jun-26-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (VIA Courtroom Phone and ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):

Atty: Alexander Balzer Carr, Esq., of Hunt & Henriques Law (abalzercarr@hunthenriques.com, & blangedyk@hunthenriques.com ) for Plaintiff via Courtroom Phone (the Court called the attorney at the Judge Pro Tem's request after vior dir of defendant).
Wei D. Cao appearing in Pro Per as the Defendant.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.'s Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted

Defendant will not stipulate to allow Judge Pro tem to hear the matter.

The Judge Pro Tem voir dirs the defendant and has the court clerk call counsel for the Plaintiff. Plaintiff informed of the matter going before Dept 302. The defendant will respond to the Request for Admissions (All five, listed on Page 9 of the motion) with verification to form (Admitted or Denied) before the June 26, hearing.

Honorable Judge Pro Tem Highmen allows Pro per defendant to oppose without notice to the other party.

Matter is continued to June 26, 2023 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion.

Pro tem judge to prepare a report and recommendation.

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman; Clerk: R. Sahatjian; Not Reported. =(302/JPT)

Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted
